name: ColorLCH
summary: Represents an LCH (Lightness, A, B) color with double precision floating point channels. LCH colors (also sometimes called CIELUV) are transformation of the 1931 CIE XYZ color space, in order to approach perceptual uniformity. They are primarily used in computer graphics which deal with colored lights.

constructors.name: ColorLCH(Color)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorLCH that is equivalent to an ARGB color.
constructors.remarks: Exact conversions between color spaces are often not possible.

constructors.name: ColorLCH(Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorLCH(double lightness, double chroma, double hue)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorLCH with custom channel values.

params.name: lightness
params.doc: Value of lightness channel. This channel is limited to 0~1.

params.name: chroma
params.doc: Value of chroma channel. This channel is limited to -1~1.

params.name: hue
params.doc: Value of chroma channel. This channel is limited to 0~360.

constructors.name: ColorLCH(Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorLCH(double alpha, double lightness, double chroma, double hue)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorLCH with custom channel values.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: Value of Alpha channel. This channel is limited to 0~1.

params.name: lightness
params.doc: Value of Lightness channel. This channel is limited to 0~1.

params.name: chroma
params.doc: Value of Chroma channel. This channel is limited to -1~1.

params.name: hue
params.doc: Value of Hue channel. This channel is limited to 0~360.

methods.name: CreateFromCMYK
methods.summary: Create the nearest LCH equivalent of a CMYK color.

returns.doc: The LCH equivalent of the CMYK color.

methods.name: CreateFromHSL
methods.summary: Create the nearest LCH equivalent of an HSL color.

returns.doc: The LCH equivalent of the HSL color.

methods.name: CreateFromLAB
methods.summary: Create the nearest LCH equivalent of a LAB color.

returns.doc: The LCH equivalent of the LAB color.

methods.name: CreateFromRGBA
methods.summary: Create the nearest LCH equivalent of an RGBA color.

returns.doc: The LCH equivalent of the RGBA color.

methods.name: CreateFromXYZ
methods.summary: Create the nearest LCH equivalent of an XYZ color.

returns.doc: The LCH equivalent of the XYZ color.

methods.name: MakePositive
methods.summary: Ensure the Chromaticity of this color is positive.

methods.name: Implicit(ColorLCH to Color)
methods.signature: public static implicit operator Color (ColorLCH lch)
methods.summary: Implicitly converts a LCH color into a .Net library color.

properties.name: A
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Alpha channel. The Alpha channel is limited to the 0~1 range.

properties.name: C
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Chroma channel. Chroma is defined from -1.0 to +1.0.

properties.name: H
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Hue channel. The hue channel is limited to the 0~360 degree range.

properties.name: L
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Lightness channel.
